title: Amazingly Optimized
description: Minecraft, but fast! That's it, nothing more, and nothing less!
body:
# About
This pack is made so that people with lower end computers can play minecraft without it looking like Microsoft Powerpoint!

The Wiki is still in progress but you can take a look here:
https://github.com/TryhardDoge/Amazingly-Optimized/wiki

The github is purely for a wiki or website, but I might take a look at the issue tracker from time to time!

# Contact Me
If you have any issues with the pack contact me on discord at: tryhard#7933

# Important Information

When you launch the game you might be prompted to install Reeses' Sodium Options, which helps reduce the clutter in Sodium's options that was caused by adding Sodium Extra to the modpack. This is your personal choice, since some people like it while others don't. I personally don't use it but you can choose which is best for you!

One important thing about the Sodium options menu is that if you have your GUI scale too high you won't see all the tabs in the settings menu. I'll list the tabs you should see below so you can make sure you have them visible;
General, Quality, Performance, Advanced, Animations, Particles, Details, Render, Extras
